data.title: Weyerhaeuser reveals 2 new engineered wood products at NAHB Builders' Show in Orlando. Showcase in Seattle, Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: Cutting-edge flooring products currently under development will be showcased at Weyerhaeuser's exhibit in Orlando. On February 17, 2026, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) unveiled two advanced engineered wood offerings at the National Association of Home Builders event.

data.title: ADP estimates U.S. private employers added 10,250 jobs per week ending Jan 31, 2026, the third consecutive increase.
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey on February 17, 2026, it was reported that U.S. private employers were adding an average of 10,250 jobs per week for the four weeks leading up to January 31, 2026. This data comes from the NER Pulse, a weekly summary derived from the monthly ADP National Employment Report. This marks the third consecutive week of steady job growth in the country.

data.title: OBOOK Holdings Inc. launches OwlPay Cash remittance app for estimated $230 billion U.S. outbound remittance economy.
data.description: OBOOK Holdings Inc. has launched OwlPay Cash, a new remittance app tailored for the U.S. outbound remittance market, which is valued at around $230 billion. The app's debut is seen as a strategic move by the company to tap into this lucrative sector. OwlPay Cash is aimed at providing a convenient and efficient way for users to send money internationally. The parent company, OBOOK Holdings Inc., is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OWLS. This development highlights a significant entry into the burgeoning remittance industry by offering a modern digital solution for the substantial flow of funds sent overseas from the U.S.

data.title: Marvion Inc. gains two new investors on Feb. 2, 2026, strengthening capital base; disclosed through Form 8-K filing.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Marvion Inc. (OTCQB: MVNC) revealed that it had secured agreements with two fresh investors in Hong Kong. The company finalized the Stock Purchase Agreements on February 2, 2026. The details of these transactions were officially documented in a Form 8-K filing.

data.title: Gibson Energy completes $215M equity offering, including over-allotment option.
data.description: In recent updates on the ongoing pandemic, it has been reported that a total of 150,000 new cases have been confirmed globally, bringing the total number of cases to 3.5 million. These new cases have resulted in an additional 3,000 deaths, raising the worldwide death toll to 250,000. The situation remains severe in many countries, with efforts to control the spread of the virus ongoing. The World Health Organization continues to monitor the situation closely and provide guidance to countries on necessary measures to combat the pandemic.

data.title: Latin Metals plans to spin out two Peruvian copper projects into Latin Explore by Q1 2026, aiming to create value for shareholders.
data.description: Latin Explore is set to acquire two copper assets located in Peru, with the completion of the spin-out expected in the first quarter of 2026. This strategic move aims to unlock significant value for shareholders by creating parallel opportunities in the lucrative copper market.

data.title: Continu launches Experts to integrate Conversational AI Agent with Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive for instant answers.
data.description: Continu's Conversational AI Agent now has the ability to link with verified platforms such as Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive, enabling real-time, access-controlled responses on Slack and Microsoft Teams. The launch of Experts by Continu in New York on February 17, 2026 introduces this new capability.

data.title: Paramount gets fresh opportunity as Warner Bros. Discovery reopens talks, facing unanswered questions.
data.description: On Tuesday, there was a new development in the takeover battle as Warner Bros. Discovery resumed discussions with the suitor that had previously been rejected. Despite this, significant uncertainties still linger around the situation.

data.title: General President O'Brien to rally with CSU Teamsters in San Francisco fighting for contractually obligated raises on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Teamsters have initiated a strike demanding contractually promised raises. General President Sean M. O'Brien will stand in solidarity with the striking California State University (CSU) Teamsters at San Francisco State University on Feb. 17. The exact figures of the raises and the number of teamsters participating in the strike were not specified. The strike is expected to continue until a resolution is reached.

data.title: Meta-analysis confirms 308 nm Excimer laser's efficacy for plaque psoriasis; supported by Georgetown Univ study (February 2026).
data.description: A recent study released in February 2026 by Georgetown University reveals a compelling trend in the use of Excimer laser UVB treatments for inflammatory skin conditions. The study underscores the effectiveness of optimized and targeted strategies using Excimer laser UVB therapy. This emerging approach is gaining traction due to a growing body of clinical evidence supporting its efficacy. Dermatologists and healthcare professionals are increasingly turning to this method, with a notable increase in the number of patients benefiting from the treatment. The study highlights the importance of tailored and precise Excimer laser UVB strategies in managing inflammatory skin conditions, offering new hope for patients seeking relief.

data.title: Palo Alto Networks to acquire Koi for Agentic Endpoint Security, reducing enterprise risks. (Words: 19)
data.description: Agentic Endpoint Security is positioned as the new leader in enterprise risk reduction, bridging the AI security gap. The rise of AI technology has significantly boosted workforce efficiency but has also led to an unmanaged attack surface on numerous endpoints. This groundbreaking solution aims to address this issue by providing comprehensive security measures. Announced in Santa Clara, California on February 17, 2026, this innovation marks a critical step forward in safeguarding businesses.

data.title: EMA to host webinar on making automation smarter with observability and analytics. AI insights improve outcomes at scale.
data.description: A recent study has showcased the benefits of utilizing AI-driven analytics to enhance automation on a large scale. Taking place on February 17, 2026, in Lafayette, Colo., Enterprise Management Associates (EMA™), a reputable IT research and consulting organization, revealed plans to conduct a live webinar focusing on the topic of How to Make Automation More Efficient. This event aims to provide valuable insights into maximizing automation results by incorporating artificial intelligence technologies.
